items.title: Federal agents seize $38 million superyacht linked to sanctioned oligarch
items.summary: The Justice Department announced the forfeiture of a 258-foot superyacht docked in Fort Lauderdale, part of a wider sanctions enforcement action.

items.title: Europol dismantles crypto laundering network, freezes $19 million in digital assets
items.summary: A coordinated operation across five member states led to the seizure of cryptocurrency wallets tied to a ransomware payment network.

items.title: NCA seizes fleet of luxury vehicles in London money laundering raid
items.summary: Officers seized a Bentley, two Range Rovers, and a Rolls-Royce believed to have been purchased with laundered funds.

items.title: Private jet and helicopter forfeited in cross-border corruption case
items.summary: A Gulfstream jet and an executive helicopter were forfeited following a multi-year investigation into bribery involving a state-owned enterprise.

items.title: Belgian villa and bank accounts frozen in money laundering probe
items.summary: Investigators froze several bank accounts and seized a coastal villa believed to hold proceeds from an investment fraud scheme.

items.title: Singapore authorities seize luxury sedans and cash in wide-ranging fraud sweep
items.summary: Local police reported the seizure of several imported luxury sedans along with an undisclosed amount of cash.

items.title: Colombian navy seizes vessel carrying suspected narcotics off Caribbean coast
items.summary: A cargo vessel was intercepted and seized in a joint operation with regional maritime authorities.

items.title: UK court orders forfeiture of penthouse apartment tied to unexplained wealth order
items.summary: The NCA secured forfeiture of a central London penthouse following one of the UK's longest-running unexplained wealth order cases.

items.title: DOJ forfeits $12.3 million in bank accounts linked to romance scam network
items.summary: Funds held across several bank accounts were forfeited following an investigation into a transnational romance scam operation.
